word: G4867 - συναθροίζω - synathroízō - soon-ath-royd'-zo - Call together

sections.paragraph:
- Original: συναθροίζω

- Transliteration: sunathroizo

- Phonetic: soon-ath-royd'-zo

- Definition:

1. to gather together with others

2. to assemble

3. to be gathered together i.e. to come together

- Origin: from G4862 and athroizo (to hoard)

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4862 and ἀθροίζω athroizō (to hoard); to convene: - call (gather) together.
